# Open-Source Dependencies (CDN — no npm build)

All libraries loaded via jsDelivr CDN. Pin versions in variant HTML/JS.

| Library | Version | License | Usage |
|---------|---------|---------|-------|
| [Three.js](https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js) | 0.170.0 | MIT | Combined grid hero |
| [GSAP](https://github.com/greensock/GSAP) | 3.12.5 | Standard (free) | Combined scroll reveals |
| [anime.js](https://github.com/juliangarnier/anime) | latest ESM | MIT | Combined hero stagger |
| [Inter](https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Inter) | — | OFL | Body text |
| [Space Grotesk](https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Space+Grotesk) | — | OFL | Display headings |

## Reference Repos (research, not vendored)

- [mrdoob/three.js](https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js) — 3D examples
- [greensock/GSAP](https://github.com/greensock/GSAP) — animation docs
- [rtk-ai/rtk](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk) — CLI token optimizer (dev tooling)

## Future (per golden rules)

- MapLibre GL JS — maps when office location added
- Flask — contact form backend endpoint
